prestazioni: Engine: L15B7T (1.5L VTEC Turbo) - Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbocharger, custom 3-inch downpipe with GReddy Revolution RS cat-back exhaust, and Hondata FlashPro ECU calibration for 300+ WHP on E30 fuel blend

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with custom valving for the ZR-V's MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear setup, paired with Whiteline front sway bar (24mm) and rear sway bar (22mm) to eliminate body roll

Drivetrain: K-Tuned 2.0L K-series oil pan baffle, 4Piston Racing 4-pot front brake calipers with 330mm slotted rotors, and a limited-slip differential from OS Giken (OS-Tech) with 2.5-way torque biasing for improved corner exit
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (OEM+ fitment) and custom front splitter with integrated air curtains
Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami in 19x9.5 +30 front and 19x10.5 +35 rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear) for aggressive stance and track-ready grip

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats with custom ZR-V-specific mounting brackets, Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub, paired with a full carbon fiber dash overlay and custom Alcantara headliner
